channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Palettes and building materials dumped from council flat reno, 21st July
item.description:
Dirty palettes outside the front of linslade house dumped from building workers still outside the front of linslade house. Please remove it looks unsightly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste Timber Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
A pile of waste timber has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Metal Cabinet Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
An unwanted metal cabinet has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 24. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Bag of Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
A large bag of rubbish has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 20. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Unwanted Mattress and Foam Dumped Under Tree, 21st July
item.description:
A large mattress and foam has been left dumped under the tree opposite number 16. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Car Body Part Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
A broken car body part has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walmer Terrace, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
A pile of rubbish has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 12. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead

item.title: Items of Rubbish Dumped on Turfed Area, 21st July
item.description:
Items of rubbish have been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southport Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electric car box, 21st July
item.description:
A week or more

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping mattress and bin bags, 21st July
item.description:
Gable wall at corner of Narford and Alconbury is common site of fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Narford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near to 64 & 76 WESTWOOD LANE Faded central road hazard markings faded, 21st July
item.description:
The white central road hazard ( hatched white lines) markings are totally faded on the bend of the road and are not visable in middle of road Westwood Lane near to 65 & 76 Westwood Lane The hazard markings should deter vehicles from cutting corners on the bend but as markings are worn and totally faded vehicles are crossing onto the wrong side of the road. The lack of visible and clear road markings is dangerous These markings need repainting as the lack of visable markings presents a safety risk.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 21st July
item.description:
Could you please empty the overflowing communal bin it hasn't been emptied in a week. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gloucester Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nw3 7nt, 21st July
item.description:
You haven't resolved the light pollution issue. Light still pours into our bedroom. The Guardian is too small to screen the lamp.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Platt's Lane, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on street, 21st July
item.description:
Downham way top of headcorn road. Rubbish on street, toys, fridge freezer. Has been there since sunday

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downham Way, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Further flytipping, 21st July
item.description:
More items have now been dumped in this spot, which is becoming a consistent fly tipping spot. This time it is children’s toys and household waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howarth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping of old mattress, 21st July
item.description:
A filthy old double mattress has been dumped in the rear access road in brunswick quay, approximately 7 days ago. pls could you remove this asap before it deteriorates further. thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brunswick Quay, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
